subcodes.first_line: Lo, the Beloved calleth: O concourse of creation! Hasten with your hearts toward the mercy of your everlasting Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المحبوب ینادی یا ملا الامکان ان اسرعوا بالقلوب الی شطر رحمه ربکم الباقی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @belief and denial
